data.name: Process Email

skilloverview.language: Outputs name, email, and the email text

data.parameterstructure: [{"data_type":"string","description":"The name associated with the email","id":"name"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The email address of the recipient or sender","id":"email"},{"data_type":"string","description":"The content or body of the email message","id":"text"}]

llmprompt.language: Answers support email when it's asking a general question or query that doesn't require human intervention.

skilloverview.language: Requires name, email, and the question as arguments (if available).

llmprompt.language: Handles emails that are critical and require immediate attention from a human agent.

skilloverview.language: Requires name, email, the primary problem and possible department to escalate this problem to.

llmprompt.language: Escalates issues that cannot be resolved by the automated system to a human agent for further handling.
